languages.text: {n}Манипулус протягивает к зловонным водам тонкий щуп ауспекс-анализатора.{/n} "Поразительно! Образцы органики в воде столь разнообразны, что по ним можно, фигурально выражаясь, понять, чем живет весь Футфол".

{n}The Manipulus extends a thin auspex-analyser probe toward the malodorous waters.{/n} "Remarkable! The organic specimens in the water are so diverse that, in a manner of speaking, they lay bare the entire way of life on Footfall."
languages.original_text: {n}Манипулус протягивает к зловонным водам тонкий щуп ауспекс-анализатора.{/n} "Поразительно! Образцы органики в воде столь разнообразны, что по ним можно, фигурально выражаясь, понять, чем живет весь Футфол".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Manipulus extends a thin auspex-analyser probe toward the foul waters.{/n} "Remarkable! The organic specimens in the water are so diverse that, in a manner of speaking, they lay bare the entire way of life on Footfall."

{n}The Manipulus extends a thin auspex-analyser probe toward the malodorous waters.{/n} "Remarkable! The organic specimens in the water are so diverse that, in a manner of speaking, they lay bare the entire way of life on Footfall."

{n}The Manipulus extends a thin auspex-analyser probe toward the malodorous waters.{/n} "Remarkable! The organic specimens in the water are so diverse that, in a manner of speaking, they lay bare the entire way of life on Footfall."

languages.text: {n}El manipulus extiende una fina sonda aúspex analizadora hacia las pestilentes aguas.{/n} «¡Fascinante! Los especímenes orgánicos del agua son tan diversos que, a su manera, reflejan el carácter de la vida en Paso en su totalidad».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus extends a thin auspex-analyser probe toward the malodorous waters.{/n} "Remarkable! The organic specimens in the water are so diverse that, in a manner of speaking, they lay bare the entire way of life on Footfall."

traits.locale_text: {n}El manipulus extiende una fina sonda aúspex analizadora hacia las pestilentes aguas.{/n} «¡Fascinante! Los especímenes orgánicos del agua son tan diversos que, a su manera, reflejan el carácter de la vida en Paso en su totalidad».

languages.text: {n}操纵者将一根纤细的俄歇矩阵分析探针伸向那片恶臭污水。{/n}“了不起！这水中的有机样本如此多样，可以说，它们完整展现了落脚港居民的生活方式。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus extends a thin auspex-analyser probe toward the malodorous waters.{/n} "Remarkable! The organic specimens in the water are so diverse that, in a manner of speaking, they lay bare the entire way of life on Footfall."

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者将一根纤细的俄歇矩阵分析探针伸向那片恶臭污水。{/n}“了不起！这水中的有机样本如此多样，可以说，它们完整展现了落脚港居民的生活方式。”

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus taucht eine schmale Auspex-Analysatorsonde in das stinkende Wasser ein.{/n} "Bemerkenswert! Die organischen Organismen im Wasser sind derart vielfältig, dass sie in gewisser Weise das gesamte Leben auf Footfall offenlegen."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus extends a thin auspex-analyser probe toward the malodorous waters.{/n} "Remarkable! The organic specimens in the water are so diverse that, in a manner of speaking, they lay bare the entire way of life on Footfall."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Manipulus taucht eine schmale Auspex-Analysatorsonde in das stinkende Wasser ein.{/n} "Bemerkenswert! Die organischen Organismen im Wasser sind derart vielfältig, dass sie in gewisser Weise das gesamte Leben auf Footfall offenlegen."

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus tend une fine sonde d'analyse auspex vers le flot malodorant.{/n} « Remarquable ! Les spécimens organiques présents dans ces eaux sont si variés qu'ils dévoilent à eux seuls le mode de vie des habitants de Castel jusque dans ses moindres détails. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus extends a thin auspex-analyser probe toward the malodorous waters.{/n} "Remarkable! The organic specimens in the water are so diverse that, in a manner of speaking, they lay bare the entire way of life on Footfall."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus tend une fine sonde d'analyse auspex vers le flot malodorant.{/n} « Remarquable ! Les spécimens organiques présents dans ces eaux sont si variés qu'ils dévoilent à eux seuls le mode de vie des habitants de Castel jusque dans ses moindres détails. »

languages.text: {n}Manipülus, kötü kokulu sulara doğru ince bir analizci uzgören sondası uzatıyor.{/n} "Olağanüstü! Sudaki organik örnekler o kadar çeşitli ki tabiri caizse Binliman'daki tüm yaşam tarzını gözler önüne seriyor."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus extends a thin auspex-analyser probe toward the malodorous waters.{/n} "Remarkable! The organic specimens in the water are so diverse that, in a manner of speaking, they lay bare the entire way of life on Footfall."

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus, kötü kokulu sulara doğru ince bir analizci uzgören sondası uzatıyor.{/n} "Olağanüstü! Sudaki organik örnekler o kadar çeşitli ki tabiri caizse Binliman'daki tüm yaşam tarzını gözler önüne seriyor."

languages.text: {n}マニピュラスは、悪臭を放つ水域に向かって、細長い探査棒を伸ばした。{/n} 「驚くべきことだ！水中の有機物は多種多様で、言い換えれば、足跡の全生命の様態を明らかにしている。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus extends a thin auspex-analyser probe toward the malodorous waters.{/n} "Remarkable! The organic specimens in the water are so diverse that, in a manner of speaking, they lay bare the entire way of life on Footfall."

traits.locale_text: {n}マニピュラスは、悪臭を放つ水域に向かって、細長い探査棒を伸ばした。{/n} 「驚くべきことだ！水中の有機物は多種多様で、言い換えれば、足跡の全生命の様態を明らかにしている。」
